abstracts.abstract: This Act provides that a landlord may not require a tenant to use a particular renters insurance company as long as the tenant maintains renters insurance according to the terms of the rental agreement.

bill.title: AN ACT TO AMEND TITLE 25 OF THE DELAWARE CODE RELATING TO RENTERS INSURANCE.

action.description: Amendment HA 1 to HB 467 - Passed In House by Voice Vote
